name: aura-memory-upgrade-tests
description: Test suite for AURA Memory OpenClaw upgrade verification

scripts.test:aura:hooks: node -e "console.log('Hook tests: Run pre and post upgrade checks')"
scripts.test:aura:context: node -e "console.log('Context tests: Run post-upgrade and smoke tests')"
scripts.test:aura:storage: node -e "console.log('Storage tests: Run smoke test and check CLI commands')"
scripts.test:aura:kg: node -e "console.log('KG tests: Run aura-memory:kg-status CLI command')"
